scripts.build: npm run build:ts && (npm run build:py || echo 'Python build skipped (e.g. externally-managed env)')
scripts.test: npm run test:ts && npm run test:py && npm run test:rs
scripts.test:py: test -d python && (command -v pytest >/dev/null 2>&1 && cd python && pytest || echo 'Python tests skipped (pytest not found)') || echo 'Python tests skipped'
scripts.test:rs: test -d rust && (cd rust && cargo test || echo 'Rust tests skipped') || echo 'Rust tests skipped'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:ts && npm run lint:py

IMESSAGE_CLI_PATH.description: Path to iMessage CLI tool (default: imsg)

IMESSAGE_POLL_INTERVAL_MS.description: Polling interval for new messages in ms

IMESSAGE_DM_POLICY.description: DM policy: open, pairing, allowlist, disabled

IMESSAGE_GROUP_POLICY.description: Group message policy: open, allowlist, disabled

IMESSAGE_ENABLED.description: Enable or disable the iMessage plugin
